description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows pip build that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a single windows-2019 job that checks out the repository, sets up msbuild, installs Python 3.10, upgrades pip, installs Qt 5.15.2, installs Python dependencies from requirements.txt, builds the package with python setup.py build_ext --inplace, and runs tests with specific environment variables.
